claim: In Q3 2024, Moutai's net margin reached 53.1%, well above the industry median.

source.title: Kweichow Moutai · Q3 2024 prelim report
source.excerpt: Total revenue for the first nine months reached RMB 123.123 bn, with net profit attributable to shareholders of RMB 60.828 bn — a net margin of about 53.1%.
